text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day of Satono Diamond's planned
staff appreciation event!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
It's finally here! The event you've all been waiting
for—the staff appreciation race!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Our first group of racers is already bursting with
energy as they wait by the gate for the race to
start!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for all your help, everyone! Let's have
lots of fun today!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you too for creating such a precious
opportunity to show everyone our gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I won't be losing this race. ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I won't be losin' this either! I'm gonna give my thanks to the staff with my overwhelmin' victory!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Please! The academy's staff members do so much
for us on a daily basis...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We want to hold a staff appreciation race for
them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since that day, Satono Diamond and the
others have been working hard to organize
today's event.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And lastly, the twelfth event will be a
1,200-meter turf race. There, now the race
schedule is all done!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'll go distribute the invitations to everyone now.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, but I'll be fine! I actually want to hand
out these invitations in person.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for always keeping everything clean
and in order. I hope you'll attend so that we might
show you the fruits of our labor.

text_block_list.name: Maintenance Management Staff
text_block_list.text:
You did all this for us?! We'll definitely come
cheer you on with all we've got!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We wouldn't be able to build ourselves up for our
races properly without the meals you lovingly
make for us!

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Staff
text_block_list.text:
It's more than enough thanks just hearing that
from you. We're greatly looking forward to the
event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all of Satono Diamond's worrying over how
to thank the academy's staff, the answer turned
out to be plain and simple.
choice_data_list:
(If everyone is rooting for you to run well, then
you just have to show off your appreciation by
running well for them, huh?)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you all once again for coming to today's
event!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
All of us here passed through the gates of this
academy holding a dream close to our hearts...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's due to the support we receive from every
single person working here at the academy that
we are able to chase our dreams every day, free
of worry.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We're bolstered by all the work you do. And to
show just how important that work is...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Please watch us in this event we've prepared for
you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Trainer! You came to watch too!
choice_data_list:
It seems you were able to convey your feelings
to everyone!

It seems you were able to convey your feelings
to everyone!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes, I was!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Listening to everyone's cheers has made me
realize yet again just how much everyone
supports us!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much for all your help!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Allow me to congratulate you on a
successful event as well. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It warms my heart to see all the staff enjoying
themselves so much!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
By the way... Would you two happen to have any
plans after today's races?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
After learning of today's event, the director
mentioned wanting to show her own appreciation
to the academy's students and staff.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing major, but she offered to hold a
celebratory after-party. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wow! That would be incredible! We'd be able to
spend even more time talking with all the staff!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But before that, I have to give it my all in the
next race!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Heeey! Dia! It's almost our turn to run!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Right! Coming!
choice_data_list: Good luck! I'm rooting for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Satono Diamond's staff
appreciation event ends in a roaring success!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Dia, there you are! Hurry up, it's almost our
turn to run!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You gotta make sure you're nice and ready so
you'll be at your best during the race!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Right! I'll be there in just a second!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Please watch me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to run my best and show everyone the
extent of my gratitude!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The excitement in the venue reaches a fever pitch
as the heated races continue. Naturally, the
runners hold a winning concert to close off the
event.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And finally for today, we'd like to pour all our
feelings into this song for you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I hope our feelings reach you all! Please enjoy our performance of We Are Dreamers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond and the other Umamusume sing
with such power and emotion that their voices
resound far and wide for all to hear.
